reason: Successfully tested agent chat functionality - sent math question and received correct numerical response.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing 3 agents.
Clicked on "QA-20260428-165640-hvb9" agent in sidebar - Agent detail page opened showing agent home with message input.
Verified agent status is "idle" - Status indicator confirmed "idle" in top-right corner.
Typed "Hello! What is 2+2?" into message input field - Message appeared in the textbox.
Clicked send button to submit message - Message was sent and chat view navigated to showing the user's message.
Waited up to 180 seconds for response - Agent responded within 2 seconds.
Verified response contains "4" - Agent's response is the number "4" displayed prominently in the chat. Screenshot confirms this.
